title: ASC Backup Exclusions (asc.backup.yaml)
description: Optional, at the repository root next to asc.yaml: paths to leave out of an 'asc backup create' archive. Patterns are relative to the installed app directory (e.g. 'data/cache/**', 'repository/vendor') and support '*' (any run of characters within one path segment), '**' (any run, crossing '/') and '?' (one character); excluding a directory excludes everything under it.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude from the backup archive
